# hdatools

hdatools is HDAdvisors’ internal R package for building on-brand charts
and reports. It bundles ggplot2 themes, color scales, and analysis
helpers for four client brands — HDAdvisors (HDA), HousingForward
Virginia (HFV), the Partnership for Housing Affordability (PHA), and
VHA. Every report across these projects looks consistent without
hand-tuning each plot.

Each brand gets a matching `theme_*()` ggplot2 theme, discrete
color/fill scales, and continuous sequential/diverging ramps, all
checked for color-vision-deficiency accessibility. A handful of analysis
helpers round it out: reliability labels from a coefficient-of-variation
column, factor recoding with automatic level ordering, and a few small
chart-formatting utilities.

This package is for HDA/HFV teammates building charts in R or Quarto. If
you want to help build hdatools itself, see
[CONTRIBUTING.md](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/CONTRIBUTING.md).

## Quick start

### Install

hdatools isn’t on CRAN. Install it from GitHub:

``` r

# install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("hdadvisors/hdatools")
```

### Fonts

hdatools bundles six fonts — Lato, Roboto Slab, Open Sans, Poppins, Noto
Sans, and Montserrat — used by its themes. It registers them with
systemfonts offline the first time you load the package, so there’s no
network request and no per-session Google Fonts download.

To supply your own font setup instead, do one of the following before
loading the package:

- Set `options(hdatools.fonts = FALSE)`
- Set the `HDATOOLS_NO_FONTS` environment variable

Rendering plots with these fonts requires a systemfonts-aware graphics
device. In a Quarto document, add this to `_quarto.yml`:

``` yaml
knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    dev: "ragg_png"
```

The default Cairo device does not consult the systemfonts registry.
Without this setting, the bundled fonts won’t appear in rendered output.

## Features

### Themes

- [`theme_hda()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/theme_hda.md):
  HDAdvisors-branded ggplot2 theme
- [`theme_hfv()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/theme_hfv.md):
  HousingForward Virginia-branded ggplot2 theme
- [`theme_pha()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/theme_pha.md):
  PHA-branded ggplot2 theme
- [`theme_vha()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/theme_vha.md):
  VHA-branded ggplot2 theme

Under ggplot2 \>= 4.0, override a theme’s `strip.text` (e.g. for faceted
plots) with
[`ggtext::element_markdown()`](https://wilkelab.org/ggtext/reference/element_markdown.html),
never a raw
[`ggplot2::element_text()`](https://ggplot2.tidyverse.org/reference/element.html).
The theme’s own strip element is a ggtext markdown element. ggplot2 4.0
only merges theme elements of the same class.

### Color Scales

- [`scale_color_hda()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_color_hda.md)/[`scale_colour_hda()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_color_hda.md),
  [`scale_fill_hda()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_fill_hda.md):
  HDA-branded discrete color scales
- [`scale_color_hfv()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_color_hfv.md)/[`scale_colour_hfv()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_color_hfv.md),
  [`scale_fill_hfv()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_fill_hfv.md):
  HFV-branded discrete color scales
- [`scale_color_pha()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_color_pha.md)/[`scale_colour_pha()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_color_pha.md),
  [`scale_fill_pha()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_fill_pha.md):
  PHA-branded discrete color scales
- [`scale_color_vha()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_color_vha.md)/[`scale_colour_vha()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_color_vha.md),
  [`scale_fill_vha()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_fill_vha.md):
  VHA-branded discrete color scales

### Continuous ramp scales

Sequential and diverging `colorspace` HCL ramps, one pair per brand. The
HDA/HFV/PHA ramps were tuned and CVD-checked in the Ramp Lab review;
VHA’s pair was generated by the same method when VHA was added. HDA’s
and VHA’s diverging ramps are provisional (see `NEWS.md`).

- [`scale_color_hda_c()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_color_hda_c.md)/[`scale_colour_hda_c()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_color_hda_c.md),
  [`scale_fill_hda_c()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_fill_hda_c.md):
  HDA-branded continuous color/fill scales
- [`scale_color_hfv_c()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_color_hfv_c.md)/[`scale_colour_hfv_c()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_color_hfv_c.md),
  [`scale_fill_hfv_c()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_fill_hfv_c.md):
  HFV-branded continuous color/fill scales
- [`scale_color_pha_c()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_color_pha_c.md)/[`scale_colour_pha_c()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_color_pha_c.md),
  [`scale_fill_pha_c()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_fill_pha_c.md):
  PHA-branded continuous color/fill scales
- [`scale_color_vha_c()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_color_vha_c.md)/[`scale_colour_vha_c()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_color_vha_c.md),
  [`scale_fill_vha_c()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_fill_vha_c.md):
  VHA-branded continuous color/fill scales
- [`scale_color_hda_b()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_color_hda_b.md)/[`scale_colour_hda_b()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_color_hda_b.md),
  [`scale_fill_hda_b()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_fill_hda_b.md):
  HDA-branded binned color/fill scales (7 classes by default)
- [`scale_color_hfv_b()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_color_hfv_b.md)/[`scale_colour_hfv_b()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_color_hfv_b.md),
  [`scale_fill_hfv_b()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_fill_hfv_b.md):
  HFV-branded binned color/fill scales (7 classes by default)
- [`scale_color_pha_b()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_color_pha_b.md)/[`scale_colour_pha_b()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_color_pha_b.md),
  [`scale_fill_pha_b()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_fill_pha_b.md):
  PHA-branded binned color/fill scales (7 classes by default)
- [`scale_color_vha_b()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_color_vha_b.md)/[`scale_colour_vha_b()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_color_vha_b.md),
  [`scale_fill_vha_b()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_fill_vha_b.md):
  VHA-branded binned color/fill scales (7 classes by default)

Each takes `palette = c("sequential", "diverging")` to choose the ramp.

### Utility Functions

- [`add_reliability()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/add_reliability.md):
  Add reliability labels based on coefficient of variation
- [`fct_case_when()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/fct_case_when.md):
  Create a factor with case_when logic and automatic level ordering
- [`markdown_wrap_gen()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/markdown_wrap_gen.md):
  Generate a function to wrap and format facet labels with markdown
- [`add_zero_line()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/add_zero_line.md):
  Add darker line to zero intercept
- [`flip_gridlines()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/flip_gridlines.md):
  Flip major gridlines from horizontal to vertical
- [`publish_plot()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/publish_plot.md):
  Create dynamic graphic from plot object when document rendered as HTML
- [`get_logo()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/get_logo.md):
  Get an HDA/HFV logo `<img>` tag for use in a plot
- [`get_output_format()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/get_output_format.md):
  Detect the current output format (studio, HTML, or PDF)
- [`adjust_base_size()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/adjust_base_size.md):
  Adjust a base font size for the detected output format
- [`register_hda_fonts()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/register_hda_fonts.md):
  Register hdatools’ bundled fonts (called automatically on load)
- `hda_colors`/`hfv_colors`/`pha_colors`/`vha_colors`: Named character
  vectors of each brand’s palette hex values
- [`hda_color()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/hda_color.md)/[`hfv_color()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/hfv_color.md)/[`pha_color()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/pha_color.md)/[`vha_color()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/vha_color.md):
  Return the hex for a named brand color (errors with the valid list on
  an unknown name)
- [`hda_span()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/hda_span.md)/[`hfv_span()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/hfv_span.md)/[`pha_span()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/pha_span.md)/[`vha_span()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/vha_span.md):
  Wrap text in a colored `<span>` for use with
  [`ggtext::element_markdown()`](https://wilkelab.org/ggtext/reference/element_markdown.html)
- [`hda_focus_pal()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/hda_focus_pal.md)/[`hfv_focus_pal()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/hfv_focus_pal.md)/[`pha_focus_pal()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/pha_focus_pal.md)/[`vha_focus_pal()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/vha_focus_pal.md):
  Focus/emphasis palette — highlight one series in the brand color, mute
  the rest to gray

## Usage

Basic example:

``` r

library(hdatools)
library(tidyverse)

# Create a sample dataset
data <- data.frame(
  x = as.character(c(1:8)),
  y = runif(8, 0, 100),
  group = rep(c("A", "B"), each = 4)
)

# Create a plot with HDA theme and colors
ggplot(data, aes(x, y, fill = group)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  scale_fill_hda() +
  add_zero_line() +
  theme_hda() +
  labs(title = "Sample Plot with HDA Theme",
       subtitle = "Using *hdatools* package",
       caption = "**Source:** Data source.")

# Add reliability labels to a dataset, naming the CV column (percent scale)
data_with_reliability <- data |> 
  mutate(cv = runif(8, 0, 50)) |> 
  add_reliability(cv_col = cv)

# Legacy path: auto-detects a single column ending in "_cv" (0-1 proportion)
data_with_legacy_cv <- data |> 
  mutate(value_cv = runif(8, 0, 0.5)) |> 
  add_reliability()

# Create a factor with custom ordering
data_with_factor <- data |> 
  mutate(factor_col = fct_case_when(
    x < 3 ~ "Low",
    x < 7 ~ "Medium",
    TRUE ~ "High"
  ))
```

![](reference/figures/hda_plot.png)

## Contributing

Want to help build hdatools itself? See
[CONTRIBUTING.md](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/CONTRIBUTING.md)
for the dev loop, commit/PR conventions, and how to file issues.

# Package index

## Themes

ggplot2 themes for HDAdvisors, HousingForward Virginia, PHA, and VHA
projects.

- [`theme_hda()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/theme_hda.md)
  : Use an HDAdvisors-branded ggplot2 theme
- [`theme_hfv()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/theme_hfv.md)
  : Use a HousingForward Virginia-branded ggplot2 theme
- [`theme_pha()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/theme_pha.md)
  : Use a PHA-branded ggplot2 theme
- [`theme_vha()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/theme_vha.md)
  : Use a VHA-branded ggplot2 theme

## Palettes & scales

Discrete, continuous, and binned color scales for all four brands.

- [`scale_color_hda()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_color_hda.md)
  [`scale_colour_hda()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_color_hda.md)
  : HDA-branded discrete color scale
- [`scale_color_hfv()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_color_hfv.md)
  [`scale_colour_hfv()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_color_hfv.md)
  : HFV-branded discrete color scale
- [`scale_color_pha()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_color_pha.md)
  [`scale_colour_pha()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_color_pha.md)
  : PHA-branded discrete color scale
- [`scale_color_vha()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_color_vha.md)
  [`scale_colour_vha()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_color_vha.md)
  : VHA-branded discrete color scale
- [`scale_fill_hda()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_fill_hda.md)
  : HDA-branded discrete fill scale
- [`scale_fill_hfv()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_fill_hfv.md)
  : HFV-branded discrete fill scale
- [`scale_fill_pha()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_fill_pha.md)
  : PHA-branded discrete fill scale
- [`scale_fill_vha()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_fill_vha.md)
  : VHA-branded discrete fill scale
- [`scale_color_hda_c()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_color_hda_c.md)
  [`scale_colour_hda_c()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_color_hda_c.md)
  : HDA-branded continuous color scale
- [`scale_color_hfv_c()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_color_hfv_c.md)
  [`scale_colour_hfv_c()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_color_hfv_c.md)
  : HFV-branded continuous color scale
- [`scale_color_pha_c()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_color_pha_c.md)
  [`scale_colour_pha_c()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_color_pha_c.md)
  : PHA-branded continuous color scale
- [`scale_color_vha_c()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_color_vha_c.md)
  [`scale_colour_vha_c()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_color_vha_c.md)
  : VHA-branded continuous color scale
- [`scale_fill_hda_c()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_fill_hda_c.md)
  : HDA-branded continuous fill scale
- [`scale_fill_hfv_c()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_fill_hfv_c.md)
  : HFV-branded continuous fill scale
- [`scale_fill_pha_c()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_fill_pha_c.md)
  : PHA-branded continuous fill scale
- [`scale_fill_vha_c()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_fill_vha_c.md)
  : VHA-branded continuous fill scale
- [`scale_color_hda_b()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_color_hda_b.md)
  [`scale_colour_hda_b()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_color_hda_b.md)
  : HDA-branded binned color scale
- [`scale_color_hfv_b()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_color_hfv_b.md)
  [`scale_colour_hfv_b()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_color_hfv_b.md)
  : HFV-branded binned color scale
- [`scale_color_pha_b()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_color_pha_b.md)
  [`scale_colour_pha_b()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_color_pha_b.md)
  : PHA-branded binned color scale
- [`scale_color_vha_b()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_color_vha_b.md)
  [`scale_colour_vha_b()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_color_vha_b.md)
  : VHA-branded binned color scale
- [`scale_fill_hda_b()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_fill_hda_b.md)
  : HDA-branded binned fill scale
- [`scale_fill_hfv_b()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_fill_hfv_b.md)
  : HFV-branded binned fill scale
- [`scale_fill_pha_b()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_fill_pha_b.md)
  : PHA-branded binned fill scale
- [`scale_fill_vha_b()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/scale_fill_vha_b.md)
  : VHA-branded binned fill scale

## Helpers

Theme utilities, font registration, and output helpers.

- [`register_hda_fonts()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/register_hda_fonts.md)
  : Register hdatools' bundled fonts for use in plots and knitr output
- [`flip_gridlines()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/flip_gridlines.md)
  : Flip default major gridlines from horizontal to vertical
- [`add_zero_line()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/add_zero_line.md)
  : Add darker line to zero intercept
- [`adjust_base_size()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/adjust_base_size.md)
  : Adjust base size for different output formats
- [`get_output_format()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/get_output_format.md)
  : Determine the current output format
- [`get_logo()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/get_logo.md)
  : Get a logo for use in a ggplot2 plot
- [`publish_plot()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/publish_plot.md)
  : Create dynamic graphic from plot object when document rendered as
  HTML
- [`markdown_wrap_gen()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/markdown_wrap_gen.md)
  : Generate a function to wrap and format facet labels with markdown

## Color utilities

Named color vectors, per-brand color accessors, ggtext span helpers, and
focus/emphasis palettes.

- [`hda_colors`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/hda_colors.md)
  : Named HDA color vector
- [`hfv_colors`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/hfv_colors.md)
  : Named HFV color vector
- [`pha_colors`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/pha_colors.md)
  : Named PHA color vector
- [`vha_colors`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/vha_colors.md)
  : Named VHA color vector
- [`hda_color()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/hda_color.md)
  : Look up a single HDA color by name
- [`hfv_color()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/hfv_color.md)
  : Look up a single HFV color by name
- [`pha_color()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/pha_color.md)
  : Look up a single PHA color by name
- [`vha_color()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/vha_color.md)
  : Look up a single VHA color by name
- [`hda_span()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/hda_span.md)
  : Wrap text in a brand-colored HTML span (HDA)
- [`hfv_span()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/hfv_span.md)
  : Wrap text in a brand-colored HTML span (HFV)
- [`pha_span()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/pha_span.md)
  : Wrap text in a brand-colored HTML span (PHA)
- [`vha_span()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/vha_span.md)
  : Wrap text in a brand-colored HTML span (VHA)
- [`hda_focus_pal()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/hda_focus_pal.md)
  : Focus/emphasis palette for HDA
- [`hfv_focus_pal()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/hfv_focus_pal.md)
  : Focus/emphasis palette for HFV
- [`pha_focus_pal()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/pha_focus_pal.md)
  : Focus/emphasis palette for PHA
- [`vha_focus_pal()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/vha_focus_pal.md)
  : Focus/emphasis palette for VHA

## Analysis utils

General-purpose analytical utilities for housing data workflows.

- [`add_reliability()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/add_reliability.md)
  : Add reliability labels based on coefficient of variation
- [`fct_case_when()`](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/reference/fct_case_when.md)
  : Create a factor with case_when logic and automatic level ordering

# Articles

### All vignettes

- [Adding a new client brand to
  hdatools](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/articles/adding-a-brand.md):
- [Using branded themes in
  hdatools](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/articles/branded-themes.md):
- [CVD accessibility audit — hdatools
  palettes](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/articles/cvd-audit.md):
- [Migrating from showtext to
  ragg](https://hdadvisors.github.io/hdatools/articles/ragg-migration.md):
